last_prompt: Implement LLM-powered dynamic task planning: add a 'wreck-it plan --goal "..."' sub-command (and an optional pre-loop planning phase in 'wreck-it run --goal "..."') that sends a natural-language goal to the Copilot SDK and receives back a structured task plan as a JSON array. The planner prompt must instruct the model to emit tasks with 'id', 'description', 'phase', and optional 'depends_on' fields. Validate the output against the Task schema before writing it to tasks.json. Add a 'generate_task_plan(goal: &str) -> Result<Vec<Task>>' method to AgentClient and a corresponding 'Plan' variant to the Commands enum in cli.rs. Add unit tests for the schema validation and ID-uniqueness checks.
